title: Irregular Implements
description: A modern remake of Random Things!
body:
Irregular Implements is a remake of [Random Things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/random-things), currently targeting 1.21.1 Neoforge.

You can see [the mod's wiki](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/irregular-implements/latest) to see a list of everything in the mod!  

***

There's a number of features from Random Things that were intentionally not implemented, for various reasons.

*   Time in a Bottle (use [this](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/time-in-a-bottle-universal) instead)
*   Eclipsed Clock (requires TIAB)
*   Runic Dust (the item was obscure, and difficult for me to reimplement)
*   Blood Moon (use [this](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhanced-celestials) instead)
*   Blood Stone (requires Blood Moon)
*   Sound Pattern, Sound Recorder, Sound Muffler, Sound Dampener (use [this](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extreme-sound-muffler) instead)
*   Sound Box (requires above stuff)
*   Loot Generator (honestly just didn't care to)
*   Magnetic Force (just thought the item was weird and possibly over powered)
*   Light Redirector (obscure and difficult)
*   Dyeing Machine (obscure and difficult)
*   Fluid Display (obscure and I'm not great at rendering)
